user.title: Connect EvolvIOT
user.description: Start pairing with the EvolvIOT app.

pair.title: Approve in the EvolvIOT app
pair.description:
Scan this QR code in the EvolvIOT app, or enter the pairing code manually.

![EvolvIOT pairing QR]({qr_image_url})

Pairing code: `{user_code}`

Pairing link: {verification_uri}

This code expires in {expires_in} seconds. After approving in the app, keep the checkbox enabled and select Submit.

data.approved: I approved this pairing in the EvolvIOT app

error.authorization_denied: Pairing was denied in the EvolvIOT app.
error.authorization_pending: Pairing is not approved yet. Approve it in the EvolvIOT app, then submit again.

abort.already_configured: This EvolvIOT account is already configured.
